details.calculation: ($81,900,000 / 37,319 total beneficiaries) = $2,194.59 per outcome. | A $1,000 donation achieves ≈ 0.456 outcomes.

details.elaboration: Quote: 'Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds.'

details.formula: Presence of a quantified counterfactual baseline

Focus on high-neglectedness areas (Wild Animals: 62%, Companion Animals: 38%).
details.formula: Proportional analysis of beneficiary populations (farmed/wild vs. companion)

metrics.context_qualifier: Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds confiscated from illegal traders in Indonesia.
metrics.evidence_quote: Helped rescue and release over 23,000 songbirds.

metrics.context_qualifier: Helped 13,350 shelter dogs and cats in 33 struggling shelters in China.
metrics.evidence_quote: Helped 13,350 shelter dogs and cats in China.
metrics.metric_name: Dogs and Cats Supported in Shelters

metrics.context_qualifier: Donated 10,400 doses of rabies vaccine to dogs in Vietnamese shelters, particularly in under-resourced rural areas.
metrics.evidence_quote: Donated 10,400 doses of rabies vaccine to dogs in Vietnamese shelters.

metrics.context_qualifier: Helped neuter 467 cats through trap, neuter, return projects with 17 groups in China.
metrics.source_citation: Animals Asia Review 2024, p. 3, p. 11, p. 14

metrics.context_qualifier: Released 51 former pet macaques into protected areas or onto a protected island in Indonesia.
metrics.evidence_quote: Helped release 31 macaques into protected areas.

metrics.context_qualifier: Rescued 13 beautiful moon bears from bile farming and brought them to sanctuaries in Vietnam.
Stopped 10 restaurants from selling dog and/or cat meat by reporting them to Chinese authorities.
metrics.evidence_quote: Stopped 10 restaurants from selling dog and/or cat meat.

metrics.context_qualifier: Rescued 2 elephants from elephant-riding tourism in Vietnam, now free to roam.
metrics.evidence_quote: Rescued 2 more elephants from elephant-riding tourism. Kham On and Y'Mam are now free to roam for the rest of their days.

metrics.context_qualifier: Provided 822 physiotherapy sessions to rescued bears across sanctuaries to improve mobility and reduce pain.
metrics.evidence_quote: Provided 822 physiotherapy sessions to rescued bears.

metrics.context_qualifier: Treated 436 companion animals (264 dogs, 172 cats) at Bach Ma sanctuary's new Companion Animal Clinic in Vietnam.
metrics.evidence_quote: In 2024, our three smallies clinics treated 436 companion animals - 264 dogs and 172 cats. And of these, 161 were neutered.

metrics.context_qualifier: Distributed 7 tonnes of rice and dog kibble, plus 4,500 cans of food, treats, and medicines to 18 shelters in Vietnam.
metrics.evidence_quote: Distributed 3.5 tonnes of rice and dog kibble to shelters in Vietnam.
metrics.metric_name: Food Distributed to Dogs and Cats in Vietnam

metrics.context_qualifier: Provided 15 shelter dogs and cats with new wheelchairs through a Vietnamese NGO.
metrics.evidence_quote: Gave 15 shelter dogs and cats new wheelchairs.
metrics.source_citation: Animals Asia Review 2024, p. 3, p. 11, p. 13

metrics.context_qualifier: Fed bears at sanctuaries over 350,000 kilograms of nutritious food, including pumpkin, carrot, sweet potato, cabbage, tomato, apple and pear.
metrics.evidence_quote: Fed the bears at our sanctuaries over 350,000 kilograms of nutritious food, including pumpkin, carrot, sweet potato, cabbage, tomato, apple and pear.

significant_events.event_name: Major New Bear Protection Campaign in Vietnam
significant_events.source_quote: In 2024, Animals Asia rolled out a major new bear protection campaign in Vietnam in a renewed push to end bile farming in the country once and for all.
significant_events.summary: Animals Asia rolled out a major new bear protection campaign in Vietnam in a renewed push to end bile farming, including community awareness and herbal alternatives.

significant_events.event_name: Stepped Up Campaign to End Dog and Cat Meat Trade in Vietnam
significant_events.source_quote: In 2024, we stepped up our campaign to end the cruel dog and cat meat trade in Vietnam.
significant_events.summary: Animals Asia stepped up its campaign to end the cruel dog and cat meat trade in Vietnam, working with government efforts to eradicate the industry.

significant_events.event_name: New Citizen Science Project: Wild Bird Welfare in China
significant_events.source_quote: At the start of 2024, we launched a new citizen science project in China - Wild Bird Welfare - to assess the harm to birds from mist nets.
significant_events.summary: Launched a new citizen science project in China to assess harm to birds from mist nets, involving field surveys and a pilot program to replace mist nets.

significant_events.event_name: Partnership for Stray Cat and Dog Support in Vietnam
significant_events.source_quote: We've partnered with vegan skin care company Cocoon on a new project, "Join Hands to Help Stray Cats and Dogs". In 2024, we: Gave 1.5 tonnes of rice, 2 tonnes of kibble, 4,500 cans of food, treats and medicines to 18 dog and cat shelters. Provided 15 wheelchairs to dogs and cats at Forever Wheelchair. Donated 10,400 doses of rabies vaccine for dogs and cats to the authorities in two under-resourced rural areas - Dak Lak and Binh Thuan (which had seen recent rabies outbreaks). Upgraded a shelter in Quang Binh, building a kitchen, installing partitions to separate dogs and cats, adding a roof and a mesh house to the cat enclosure, and installing a 1,000-litre water tank.
significant_events.summary: Partnered with vegan skin care company Cocoon on 'Join Hands to Help Stray Cats and Dogs' project, providing food, wheelchairs, vaccines, and shelter upgrades.

significant_events.source_quote: In 2024, we introduced annual physiotherapy assessments for our Tam Dao bears and launched a physio program for our new Bach Ma sanctuary.
significant_events.summary: Introduced annual physiotherapy assessments for Tam Dao bears and launched a physio program for the new Bach Ma sanctuary in 2024.

significant_events.event_name: Launch of Companion Animal Clinic at Bach Ma Sanctuary
significant_events.source_quote: Our Bach Ma vet team has launched its own Companion Animal Clinic catering to the cats and dogs of employees and families living in and around the sanctuary.
significant_events.summary: Our Bach Ma vet team launched its own Companion Animal Clinic, providing free vaccinations, flea treatment, deworming, and neutering for local dogs and cats.

significant_events.event_name: Working to Reduce Human-Bear Conflict in China
significant_events.source_quote: Continued working with the authorities to reduce human-bear conflict in China.
significant_events.summary: Continued working with authorities to reduce human-bear conflict in China, providing training and educational services.

significant_events.source_quote: Planted 3 new community herbal gardens, bringing the total number across Vietnam to 35. We work with schools and local communities to create the gardens and raise awareness of herbal alternatives to bear bile.
significant_events.summary: Planted 3 new community herbal gardens in Vietnam, bringing the total to 35, to raise awareness of herbal alternatives to bear bile.

data.original_text: Animals Asia is dedicated to ending the barbaric practice of bear bile farming and improving animal welfare in China and Vietnam. Over 10,000 bears - mainly moon bears, but also sun bears and brown bears - are held captive on bile farms in China, and around 400 in Vietnam.
We have rescued over 650 bears from this terrible industry enabling them to live without pain or suffering in our rescue centers in China and Vietnam.
In 2021 we undertook the largest Asiatic black bear rescue in the world, which involved moving 101 moon bears from an ex-bile farm in China to our sanctuary in Chengdu.
In 2017, we signed a legally binding agreement with the Vietnamese government that will see us work together to close every farm with the aim of rescuing all remaining bears in Vietnam.
Animals Asia Foundation (AAF) is a Hong Kong–based charity that seeks to end cruelty to animals in Asia.

The organization raises awareness of the inhumane methods used in bear bile farming, which involve bears living up to 25 years in small cages, with metal catheters inserted into their abdomens for bile extraction, or even open wounds through which the bile drips.
The organization also works "to reduce the demand for bile in Asia by promoting affordable, effective and cruelty free alternatives."
Animals Asia has rescued over 670 bears, caring for them at our award-winning bear sanctuaries in China and Vietnam.
We also work against the trade in dogs and cats for food in Asia and lobby to improve the welfare of companion animals and promote humane population management.

We campaign for better conditions in zoos and safari parks in Asia and work closely with governing authorities to improve animal management and increase awareness of the welfare needs of captive wild animals.

We provide training and educational services to animal management professionals, veterinarians, educators, and the public to raise awareness of animal welfare and animal sentience concepts and drive long-term change.
Protect bears, ensure they are free from harm, and provide them with sanctuary.
Improve the welfare of captive wild animals.
Improve the welfare of dogs and cats.
Animals Asia's Cat and Dog welfare team raised donations and delivered over six tons of cat and dog food to support animals impacted by the COVID-19 quarantine in Wuhan.

Animals Asia's Cat and Dog Welfare team achieved a huge victory after receiving news of the new regulation. Stated in China's recent national catalogue of Livestock and Poultry Genetic Resources, it bans the selling of live dogs and dog meat for food.
Animals Asia rescued 10 more bears, bringing to 680 the total number rescued.
We helped to free tens of thousands of trafficked songbirds in Indonesia.
Our therapy dogs visited over 9,000 people in hospitals, schools and care homes.
We completed Phase One of our second bear sanctuary in Vietnam.
We helped rebuild a fire-damaged shelter in China, benefiting 250 cats.
